name: Team Weld
subject: Bernie Sanders 51%, Donald Trump 43%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4lmwlHHO21b1yw-kI-8ehYIQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191212_fr_bs&n=1) **_Short term plans, long term problems._** ← Remember this phrase, because if we don’t act now, it’ll be too late for the Republican Party to fix a catastrophic mistake. In poll after poll, President Trump is significantly trailing Bernie Sanders. _In fact, recent polling released this week shows him down 8 points!_ [__](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4lmwlHHO21b1yw-kI-8ehYIQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191212_fr_bs&n=2) Say what you will about the divisions inside the GOP right now, but it’s clear that President-Elect Bernie Sanders will make it his top priority to implement the Democrats’ socialist agenda if we simply stay the course. _In 2018, President Trump’s irrational behavior elected Nancy Pelosi Speaker of the House. Unless we take action right now, he’s going to make a Democrat the next President in 2020._ [**The only way we can short circuit this impending disaster is to nominate a true conservative like Bill Weld, but we can’t do it without your support. Can you help us fight for the Republican Party by chipping in today?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4lmwlHHO21b1yw-kI-8ehYIQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191212_fr_bs&n=3) | | [SUPPORT BILL ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4lmwlHHO21b1yw-kI-8ehYIQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191212_fr_bs&n=4)
---
**President Trump isn’t our only option, and we can save the 2020 Election before it goes sideways.**[**Will you join us?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22ffbCoi2w_B2S3RTuNKmizztwjH2KFjX68OmdwkNb4lmwlHHO21b1yw-kI-8ehYIQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191212_fr_bs&n=5)
\-- Team Weld

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191212_fr_bs&n=7) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191212_fr_bs&n=8).

name: Warren 2020
subject: What the polls tell us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Polls change every day, and we don't use them to tell us how to run our campaign. But what polls do tell us is that this is a close race, and we need to expand our movement as much as possible... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b294/45c30650/11245889f/66f8bc03/3627399859/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're entering the final stretch before the Iowa Caucuses, and check out this recent _CBS/YouGov_ poll:

**_Iowa_**
Biden: 22%
Sanders: 22%
Buttigieg: 21%
Warren: 18%

Polls change every day, and we don't use them to tell us how to run our campaign. But what polls _do_ tell us is that this is a close race, and we need to expand our movement as much as possible.

And with your support, we can do that.

Because the donations we receive from emails like this one help to hire organizers who will chat face-to-face with caucus-goers, purchase digital ads to introduce someone to Elizabeth's plans for the first time, and host town halls for people to meet and hear from Elizabeth and be able to ask any question they want.

**Here's the truth: When more and more people learn about Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change -- and how those plans can impact their lives -- they join this fight.**

[**We're counting on supporters like you to help connect with as many caucus-goers as possible. Can you please chip in $2 right now to help expand our movement during these critical weeks before the Iowa Caucuses?**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM10F_EGR_NUM_W_20191212_V1S1_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM10F_EGR_NUM_W_20191212_V1S1_P_T2) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: I'm asking because this matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We're close -- but we can't fall short with so much at stake.
| | [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8379?t=3&akid=8008%2E868730%2EdZInF_) | [CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8379?t=4&akid=8008%2E868730%2EdZInF_)
---
Friend,
Our goal is a fraction of what the Republican Governors Association already has on-hand right now to take Jay out of office next year. They have raised more than $186 million since 2017 -- and they have just three incumbent Democratic governors to spend it on.
_Jay is one of them._
$50,000 in grassroots donations matters so much more than their millions in corporate and big-money donations because it's an investment from folks like you who want to see real progress here in Washington and real progress across the country.
[**We're just $9,387 short of our $50,000 goal. I'm asking because the freeze is coming TOMORROW, and we cannot fall short: Will you donate $1 or more right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8379?t=6&akid=8008%2E868730%2EdZInF_)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I entered this race to bring Americans together in common purpose, to show that when we join together and work together, we will rise together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I'm in this race to win it.
| | |
---
| Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw this message: **We know that there is a clear path to victory, and we don 't need the December debate stage to get there.** The support we've received from people like you has been incredible. And I'm confident that together we can take this fight all the way to next November. **[But I can't do it alone. If you're with me, please make a donation today to help our campaign have the strongest ground game possible going into the Iowa caucuses in February.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I entered this race to bring Americans together in common purpose and to show that when we join together and work together, we will rise together. This race is far from over, and I'm grateful to have you by my side. Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ **Team, I want you to hear this from me: I 'm in this race to win it, and our path forward is clear.** I may not be on the debate stage next Thursday, but thanks to the outpouring of support from this community over the past few weeks, we know there's a path to victory and we no longer need the December debate stage to get there. The voters deserve to decide who the Democratic nominee should be -- and I know that together, we can win this race. If I'm not on the debate stage next week, I'll be on the road hearing directly from and sharing my vision with the people who will determine the outcome of this race. I'll be doing what we've done for the last ten months of this campaign and throughout my time in public service -- meeting people where they are, in living rooms and church basements, at coffee shops and in diners, and discussing how to tackle the most pressing challenges we face. **Because the truth is that in America, we share a common pain, and to beat Trump and heal our country, we must unite with a sense of common purpose.** I've spent my entire career bringing people together to take on our toughest challenges. I beat slumlords who were taking advantage of low-income families, ushered in Newark's greatest economic growth in a generation in the wake of the Great Recession, and overcame the broken politics of Washington to get criminal justice reform passed into law. I'm building a campaign to win, and that begins with the Iowa caucuses on February 3rd. But I can't do this alone -- I need you with me if we are going to succeed. [**Can you rush a donation right now to make sure we 've got the strongest ground game going into the Iowa caucuses?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I know I say this a lot, but **beating Donald Trump is the floor, not the ceiling.** We need a leader in the Oval Office who's able to unite our deeply divided nation and begin the healing our country so desperately needs. It's time for a president who brings us together as one nation, not one who drives us apart with hate and fear. **If you give me the chance, I will be that president. It 's why I'm putting out this call to action: [Will you stand with me in this race?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This community has stuck with me when others have counted us out. This community is why we're still here now and why we'll be here for the long run. **For that, I 'm grateful.** I'm not sticking around for vanity or ego -- I'm in this to win it because I believe I'm the best candidate to beat Donald Trump and lead this country to higher ground. [**I hope you 're with me.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l4&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191212_CB_20191212-fr-CB-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c21/5fca0d19/783f450a/291c9fb1/410946499/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c21/5fca0d19/783f450a/291c9fb0/410946499/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c21/5fca0d19/783f450a/291c9fbf/410946499/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c21/5fca0d19/783f450a/291c9fbe/410946499/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c21/5fca0d19/783f450a/291c9fbd/410946499/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c21/5fca0d19/783f450a/291c9fb1/410946499/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

The support we've received from people like you has been incredible. And I'm confident that together we can take this fight all the way to next November. "=" I entered this race to bring Americans together in common purpose and to show that when we join together and work together, we will rise together. This race is far from over, and I'm grateful to have you by my side. Cory \---FORWARDED MESSAGE--- Team, I want you to hear this from me: I 'm in this race to win it, and our path forward is clear. I may not be on the debate stage next Thursday, but thanks to the outpouring of support from this community over the past few weeks, we know there's a path to victory and we no longer need the December debate stage to get there. The voters deserve to decide who the Democratic nominee should be -- and I know that together, we can win this race. If I'm not on the debate stage next week, I'll be on the road hearing directly from and sharing my vision with the people who will determine the outcome of this race. I'll be doing what we've done for the last ten months of this campaign and throughout my time in public service -- meeting people where they are, in living rooms and church basements, at coffee shops and in diners, and discussing how to tackle the most pressing challenges we face. Because the truth is that in America, we share a common pain, and to beat Trump and heal our country, we must unite with a sense of common purpose. I've spent my entire career bringing people together to take on our toughest challenges. I beat slumlords who were taking advantage of low-income families, ushered in Newark's greatest economic growth in a generation in the wake of the Great Recession, and overcame the broken politics of Washington to get criminal justice reform passed into law. I'm building a campaign to win, and that begins with the Iowa caucuses on February 3rd. But I can't do this alone -- I need you with me if we are going to succeed. "=" I know I say this a lot, but beating Donald Trump is the floor, not the ceiling. We need a leader in the Oval Office who's able to unite our deeply divided nation and begin the healing our country so desperately needs. It's time for a president who brings us together as one nation, not one who drives us apart with hate and fear. If you give me the chance, I will be that president. It 's why I'm putting out this call to action: "=" This community has stuck with me when others have counted us out. This community is why we're still here now and why we'll be here for the long run. For that, I 'm grateful. I'm not sticking around for vanity or ego -- I'm in this to win it because I believe I'm the best candidate to beat Donald Trump and lead this country to higher ground. "=" Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. subject: a nasty barrage of attacks

body:

name: Gov. Kate Brown, Stacey Abrams (2)
subject: FWD:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team, I'm writing to make sure you had a chance to read Stacey Abrams' message this week. It's critically important.
You and I know that to have a democracy that is truly of, by, and for the people, every voter must be able to cast a ballot and that ballot must be counted. But GOP efforts to suppress the vote and rig maps continue. Republican governors are attacking college students' right to vote, purging voters from their rolls, and trying to undermine the 2020 census.

We can't let this assault on democracy go unchallenged. So I've teamed up with Stacey and the DGA to launch Every State, Every Vote to take action and protect the vote. **[Team, will you join us now in the fight to secure fair elections?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY3MTExMzUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDg3NTkwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
| | | [Add your name to secure fair elections](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3MTExMzUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDg3NTkwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks so much for taking action,

Kate Brown
Governor of Oregon ****
\------Forwarded message ----------
From: Stacey Abrams <info@dga.net>
Date: Monday, December 9, 2019

Team -
When I ran for governor in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced far too many voices.

This level of voter suppression is still happening today. In states across our nation, free and fair elections are under attack.

I waged this fight because I want every voice to be heard and the every eligible vote to be counted. As state Republicans pass legislation limiting that access to the ballot box, our work is more important than ever. **That is why we are coming to you with an important request, Team.**

**[Will you stand with me and the DGA and commit to securing fair elections?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY3MTExMzUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDg3NTkwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
| | | [Add your name to secure fair elections](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3MTExMzUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDg3NTkwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I know that together we can fight for fair elections and fair maps to protect the voices of voters nationwide. But problems this big need broad solutions, so I am partnering with the DGA and Oregon Governor Kate Brown to launch Every State, Every Vote - a comprehensive program aimed at protecting voters, ending map manipulation, and fixing our nation's broken electoral system.

With your help, we will register every eligible voter, see and hear marginalized communities, and give folks a reason to get out and vote. To do that, I need to know that you are in this fight with me.
**[Team, can I count on your support to achieve free and fair elections?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3MTExMzUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDg3NTkwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
The only way we can stop Republican attempts to hijack our democracy is to make sure every voice counts. Do not let this moment pass us by.

Yours in the fight,
Stacey Abrams

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16711135&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MDg3NTkwMAS2&spReportId=MTc4MDg3NTkwMAS2).

Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

_**It was awesome**_. I shared on national television why I think we have to put a stop to the constant division and socialist policies brought on by “the Squad” - they are tearing our country apart. _AOC and the rest of her Socialist friends in Congress, pretending to know what’s best for women and our country._ **That’s why... myself and three other like-minded Republican candidates for US Congress announced today we are forming our own Squad to take them on.**

name: Steve Chabot
subject: the last step
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdudvjt-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

I know I’ve been emailing you about impeachment a lot lately, but I wanted to make sure you heard this as soon as possible...

Democrats are voting to advance impeachment today. This latest step tees up a final vote by the full House.

This means, in a matter of days, President Trump could be officially IMPEACHED by the House of Representatives, despite a complete lack of any evidence.

At this critical moment in our nation’s history, I need you to stand strong for our Constitution, our future, and our president! [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_20191212_20191212_judiciaryvote_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

The future of our democracy hangs in the balance, I need you to be on the right side of history.

Will you chip in now to help me fight the Democrats’ impeachment sham? https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/ [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_20191212_20191212_judiciaryvote_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

We know what they’re doing is wrong.

name: Peter Khalil
subject: Justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
body:
| | | | Let me tell you what I know about justice...
---
---
**—**
_**As a lawyer in America, I learned that you only get the justice you can afford**_.
On the campaign trail, I've met dozens of people who have been railroaded by our justice system.
I've met people who have spent ungodly lengths of time in prison for nonviolent drug offenses.
I've met people whose divorces have ruined them financially.
I've met people who have been discriminated against in the workplace, but who can't afford to sue for their rights.
I've met people who suffer unpunished violence.
And most of all, I've met people who endure the daily systemic slights that come with being poor in America.
_**As a lawyer in America, I also know which parts of the justice system we can fix to make it better.**_
We must enact criminal justice reform and end mass incarceration.
We must expand _pro bono_ access-to-justice programs.
We must reduce barriers to getting cases to into the courts and end mandatory arbitration.
We must expand crime victims' rights.
_**You can help send me to Congress to reform our justice system by**_[ _**contributing to this campaign right now**_](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYN6pl0-2FWBthAfFjKtIUkeW8ja6P0pE-2BHZzPxW9-2FjzG-2BPHkAtOJ3eORenM7dcA5JGIAcI2j9XeuQNnqgyj2wyp5SWUat0dl3dlyS3nVI4ybejM_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxBuBMDLO9AVxPC05bohUzmhXtQTQ2DSNXII4McQFud1QPFGxwRDLaZdPoy618PDiiEUY9OAY-2FhZSXQjHkqT0CcAZG0kc1Gu3NRihHCLi0-2FBYAH7TwuL4xQg8l8UOxTbF5GTO2PResB0pqK-2BxLR1KmNx-2B4xrJ03Ok9eWATGGUwSQfOf-2FjbjGB0rZYtQ8q88nV66pqzn7goPKJenM3oLh9hWmz79mSjkuKTqzJP0P-2FBIdTPpDVm4ZMIqSCRSJfJrNwULc2dBrrMf-2BGr9dhkuN6QxjY4Amchsrhpigb77OlrnC8LmGAv0QKSNJUgo7qIfy9TpIMD4BhAaR8n8-2FOqP1-2BMBtbPwdWCdkD-2FwNSFaZFGoY5jMZ-2FPDGims6P9fX-2Fxx6CEzf7Mo-2FGB3o9t4GtaYD3OSD9IR9aE0UZbbHlrz05JTALYRahBY0RVzBm3Eox9i2qPClKOnVZ6zlGxdeVehyxmx38AmMjQcDFS7sGT3Ciclec-3D) _**. **_
Together, we can change the face of justice in America.
Peter

N/A,

The AP News is reporting that that my liberal Democrat opponent has raised a record sum of money to beat me in 2020. His haul? A staggering $14 million - _in less than nine months!_

Make no mistake, this race is officially underway. **[In fact, the only way I'll be able to gain equal footing and defeat Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer's hand-picked candidate is with the help of grassroots supporters, like you.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53768449:sV1ZUyvNO:m:1:2105898951:1A7B790C1C833082AEE7F2448DB2751A:r)**

[ HELP MARTHA WIN ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53768449:sV1ZUyvNO:m:1:2105898951:1A7B790C1C833082AEE7F2448DB2751A:r)
To make matters worse, apparently the radical Left's master plan to defeat me in their larger scheme to flip the Senate is just getting started.

Liberal special interests and partisan Democrats are pouring outside money into Arizona and into the pocket of my liberal challenger.

When it's all said and done..._**I could be a facing a war chest of over $40 million.**_

The thing is, it's going to take more than $40 million to deter me, especially with allies like you by my side. You know my conservative record and history of getting the job done is exactly what Washington needs, **[I know with your support we can pick up the pace.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53768449:sV1ZUyvNO:m:1:2105898951:1A7B790C1C833082AEE7F2448DB2751A:r)**

I know I don't need to go into detail about what's at stake this election, but if we allow Democrats like Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren to take control of the Senate - ALL of our conservative progress will be instantly crushed.

As a country, the last thing we need is a Democrat-controlled Senate waging obstruction and making vital policy decisions (remember Elizabeth Warren and AOC's Green New Deal?).

**[N/A, your support today will help me prevent that from happening. Thank you for letting me continue to be your #1 ally in the Senate!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53768449:sV1ZUyvNO:m:1:2105898951:1A7B790C1C833082AEE7F2448DB2751A:r)**

To make matters worse, apparently the radical Left's master plan to defeat me in their larger scheme to flip the Senate is just getting started. Liberal special interests and partisan Democrats are pouring outside money into Arizona and into the pocket of my liberal challenger. When it's all said and done...I could be a facing a war chest of over $40 million. The thing is, it's going to take more than $40 million to deter me, especially with allies like you by my side. You know my conservative record and history of getting the job done is exactly what Washington needs, I know I don't need to go into detail about what's at stake this election, but if we allow Democrats like Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren to take control of the Senate - ALL of our conservative progress will be instantly crushed. name: Mary Mancini
subject: SPECIAL IMPEACHMENT EDITION: It is a big deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Dear Peter,

In America, nobody is above the law - not even the president of the United States. Our elected members of Congress must be able to investigate serious abuses of our trust by other elected officials. Today's historic vote on the two articles of impeachment was more than warranted, it was Congress protecting our freedom.

What Trump did is a big deal:

Trump abused the power of the presidency. Trump used the official powers of his office for his own personal gain. Trump pressured a foreign country to interfere in our elections to ensure his victory, risking our national security in the process. That is a violation of his constitutional oath, the public trust, and an impeachable offense. Period.
Trump obstructed congress. He tried to cover up his abuse of power by directing an unprecedented effort to keep people close to him from testifying despite lawfully issued subpoenas. He violated his constitutional oath by impeding a congressional investigation and keeping the American people in the dark. Congress had a constitutional duty to act.
Trump's misconduct - his abuse of power and his obstruction of congress - warrant the charges filed against him and follow a pattern of personal and political behavior that is corrupt, deceitful, and self-serving.

Self-serving: Because Trump's day-to-day behavior is so absurdly always about Trump, it's easy for folks to just shrug their shoulders and say, that's just Trump being Trump or even excuse it as normal. It is not normal for there to be flagrant political, personal influence in foreign policy. Multiple long-serving American public servants have testified that such a request was unheard of, “unusual and inappropriate."

Corrupt: Many of President Trump's closest friends, advisors, and lawyers have been charged, convicted or are in jail, six from Mueller-related investigations alone. The latest ruling against Trump is that he must pay restitution for stealing from his own charity and has to pay $25 million to former students of Trump University for swindling them out of their hard-earned dollars.
Deceitful: Congress and their committees act on our behalf - that's why we elected them. They have the power to issue subpoenas for testimony and even presidents must comply. Trump directed a concerted and unprecedented defiance of lawful congressional-issued subpoenas.

Despite what the Republicans on the committee, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans will say, what Trump did is a big deal. It's not "business as usual."

These articles of impeachment are not only justified but what our country needs to keep our freedom.

Mary
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

CONTRIBUTE TO THE TNDP
Thank you! Your contribution sustains our work to recruit and train excellent candidates, build out effective campaigns, build the infrastructure necessary to invest in and mobilize our county parties (our boots on the ground!), and win elections.

body:
Make no mistake, this race is officially underway and the numbers are staggering. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53771145:WZcYkCvNC:m:1:2132176598:2D5048068F70F8BB1F9A3213FF6B1F6B:r)
---
Peter,

The AP News is reporting that that my liberal Democrat opponent has raised a record sum of money to beat me in 2020. His haul? A staggering $14 million - _in less than nine months!_

Make no mistake, this race is officially underway. **[In fact, the only way I'll be able to gain equal footing and defeat Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer's hand-picked candidate is with the help of grassroots supporters, like you.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53771145:WZcYkCvNC:m:1:2132176598:2D5048068F70F8BB1F9A3213FF6B1F6B:r)**

[ HELP MARTHA WIN ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53771145:WZcYkCvNC:m:1:2132176598:2D5048068F70F8BB1F9A3213FF6B1F6B:r)
To make matters worse, apparently the radical Left's master plan to defeat me in their larger scheme to flip the Senate is just getting started.

Liberal special interests and partisan Democrats are pouring outside money into Arizona and into the pocket of my liberal challenger.

When it's all said and done..._**I could be a facing a war chest of over $40 million.**_

The thing is, it's going to take more than $40 million to deter me, especially with allies like you by my side. You know my conservative record and history of getting the job done is exactly what Washington needs, **[I know with your support we can pick up the pace.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53771145:WZcYkCvNC:m:1:2132176598:2D5048068F70F8BB1F9A3213FF6B1F6B:r)**

[ HELP MARTHA WIN ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53771145:WZcYkCvNC:m:1:2132176598:2D5048068F70F8BB1F9A3213FF6B1F6B:r)
I know I don't need to go into detail about what's at stake this election, but if we allow Democrats like Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren to take control of the Senate - ALL of our conservative progress will be instantly crushed.

As a country, the last thing we need is a Democrat-controlled Senate waging obstruction and making vital policy decisions (remember Elizabeth Warren and AOC's Green New Deal?).

**[Peter, your support today will help me prevent that from happening. Thank you for letting me continue to be your #1 ally in the Senate!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53771145:WZcYkCvNC:m:1:2132176598:2D5048068F70F8BB1F9A3213FF6B1F6B:r)**

In service,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53771145:WZcYkCvNC:m:1:2132176598:2D5048068F70F8BB1F9A3213FF6B1F6B:r)

| | | Peter, I'm fired up, and believe me... with less than 100 days to go, we're not letting up.

_This primary race is heating up, and I 'm counting on friends like YOU!_

Today, we're launching our end-of-year fundraising drive. My team has run the numbers. We need to raise $89,280 this month to kick off 2020 strong.

**[Rush a $10, $25, $50, or $100 year-end contribution to help us reach this vital goal!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=edb1561833c1ce46354f1ef492fb61702799d0a879f052c9bfce9271fceea5be3c7b343f8be8475607517c2bb6c0289aa6360283bb3e59e4 "Rush a $10, $25, $50, or $100 year-end contribution to help us reach this vital goal!")**

I'm running to take on liberal U.S. Senator Doug Jones in a crowded GOP field. Voters have a number of options. But the choice is clear.

ALL of my Republican opponents in the March 3 primary are establishment politicians. **The worst among them is Jeff Sessions, who FAILED President Trump and is now desperate to return to the D.C. swamp lifestyle he enjoyed for more than 20 years!**

I need your help to defeat these establishment career politicians, Peter. Like President Trump, I'm a conservative outsider fighting to save America... and I have the President's back 100 percent.

I know we can win the primary, and then defeat Doug Jones next November. But I can't do it without the sustaining support of grassroots conservatives like you.

**[Please chip in today to show where YOU stand in this race](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=edb1561833c1ce46102895b0d0fdb6ef5450e9a8832bbcef0680c808509ac7cdbac3ffe730981c595621f9911a05b4cc70e8ff14b2689ee1 "Please chip in today to show where YOU stand in this race")**.

body:
We have opened enrollment for 2020 Charter Memberships and President Trump now more than ever needs your support.

body:
If we don’t see an uptick, and fast, we may fall short before our deadline. We can’t afford that.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J) Yang Gang --

I’m in Iowa on Andrew’s bus tour and the crowds that are showing up are incredible. I can see our campaign growing more and more every day.

But I just got back on the bus and took a look at our progress to our $2 million goal.

I’m not going to lie: for the first time ever, we might miss it. **And if we don’t see an uptick, and fast, we may fall short before our deadline. We can’t afford that.**

[Can you make a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign? This is the most direct way to make an impact in Iowa, New Hampshire, and every early state in this moment. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=5&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)

Everywhere we go, Andrew is welcoming people to our movement for an abundant future.

Andrew is sharing his positive vision for our country. A future where we value and invest in everyone.

Whether it’s the Freedom Dividend or Medicare for all or fighting and adapting to our changing economy and climate, **Andrew is committed to rewriting the rules to work for _US_ again, not just the wealthy or big corporations. **

But it’s our job, Yang Gang, to make sure Andrew can win this thing. That takes money and resources to run ads, open offices, and hire more organizers.

[Can you make an investment for the future of our country? Every dollar you give ensures we make history with Andrew in 2020. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=13&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=7&amount=25&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)
---
That’s how we win -- with a positive vision for _a new way forward._

Thank you,

Eric Ming
Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19649?t=6&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4684%2E377263%2EoxIR-J) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Sign our petition: Demand Mitch McConnell allow a Senate vote on lowering prescription drug costs.
body:
Rx drugs are too expensive.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd2/4bef7a87/6a4af96a/287fec50/2392465061/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

The House of Representatives just passed Lower Drug Costs Now Act, which would lower the cost of prescription drugs and give hope to the 58 million Americans who struggle to afford their medications.
**BUT Mitch McConnell is refusing to allow a vote in the Senate.**
**[Sign our petition: Demand Mitch McConnell allow a Senate vote on lowering prescription drug costs.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd2/4bef7a87/6a4af96a/287fec57/2392465061/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/petition-rxcosts?source=em191213-1-a")**
******[SIGN THE PETITION](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd2/4bef7a87/6a4af96a/287fec57/2392465061/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/petition-rxcosts?source=em191213-1-a")******
This bill is currently sitting on Mitch McConnell's desk with the 400 other pieces of legislation he refuses to allow votes on. It's just wrong. **[Sign our petition if you agree.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd2/4bef7a87/6a4af96a/287fec57/2392465061/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/petition-rxcosts?source=em191213-1-a")**
**\- Team Sara**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd2/4bef7a87/6a4af96a/287fec56/2392465061/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd2/4bef7a87/6a4af96a/287fec55/2392465061/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fd2/4bef7a87/6a4af96a/287fec54/2392465061/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: BREAKING: Nancy Pelosi readies full House vote on impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | House Democrats are forging ahead, Peter. The House Judiciary Committee has debated the articles of impeachment and sent them to the full House of Representatives. It's now up to Nancy Pelosi and the Democratic caucus to hold the president accountable and impeach him. Republicans, on the other hand, have been too busy screaming about fake hoaxes and doubting Justice Department reports confirming election interference from Russia to care that the president has egregiously violated the Constitution. The president's going to continue trying to distract America from the truth, and the GOP is going to continue pushing false stories about Democrats to dissuade voters from showing up to the polls, so we need to know what engaged Democrats think: **Do you support impeaching Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf45/6e9863e8/173f2e56/1db0b7fd/1095976582/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/NFd9F4y9") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf45/6e9863e8/173f2e56/1db0b7fd/1095976582/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/NFd9F4y9") Thank you for participating, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf45/6e9863e8/173f2e56/1db0b7c3/1095976582/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191212c.ND&refcode2=1JhRpkIRuYp4vVlJDF8Y")
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20003

subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:

| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91b/134673f2/91d59f9/699789f0/2005651291/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and we've got some work to do.

[We've gotten on more than a dozen state ballots, opened new offices, and hired more field staff, but we need to raise another $30,000 by Sunday night if we're going to keep building at the pace we need to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91b/134673f2/91d59f9/699789f7/2005651291/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

While some top-tier candidates have started to burn out after months or even years in the spotlight, I'm in this for the long haul.

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[**Making your first donation today would make a huge impact. Any amount you donate today will help us reach this crucial goal. Team, I 'm asking, will you chip in today? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91b/134673f2/91d59f9/699789f0/2005651291/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91b/134673f2/91d59f9/699789f4/2005651291/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I know we can reach this goal together, team.

If we do, we can continue hiring new organizers and building our movement to reach out to the 70% of Democrats who haven't made up their mind yet about who they are supporting in this primary.

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba91b/134673f2/91d59f9/699789f7/2005651291/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Cory Booker
subject: We didn't make it to the stage, team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Last night marked the deadline to qualify for next week's debate. As we had assumed, we didn't make it.
I'm not worried, team -- we still have a very real path to victory.
**Here 's the good news: I'm proud to announce that because of the determination of this community, we'll be running $500,000 worth of new ads in Iowa** \-- a testament to the underlying strength of this grassroots team.
We were radically transparent about how much we needed to raise, and because of supporters like you, we hit our goal.
**It 's important -- _now more than ever_ \-- that we keep bringing in the resources to spread our message of justice and opportunity for all nationwide. I'm asking if you can chip in $5 right now to help us: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191213_CB_20191213-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
The pundits may try to tell you otherwise, but the race remains wide open. We far exceeded the DNC's threshold of 200,000 donors, reaching 234,419 individual donors.
The enthusiasm I saw during my trip to Iowa this past weekend was palpable. New endorsements are coming in and new supporters are joining our campaign daily. We even saw the biggest online fundraising day of our entire campaign just last week. **This is a true, unwavering showing of what an underdog campaign can do.**
**But here 's the bad news: Debate nights have typically been big fundraising moments for our campaign. The pressure is on to keep hitting our goals even though I won't be on the stage. Again, here's a link if you're able to send in a donation right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191213_CB_20191213-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I have no doubt that we have a path to Iowa, a path to the general, and a path to the White House.
Thankful for this team,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191213_CB_20191213-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c20/5fca0d19/78239764/291c9ff2/205311244/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c20/5fca0d19/78239764/291c9ff1/205311244/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c20/5fca0d19/78239764/291c9ff0/205311244/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c20/5fca0d19/78239764/291c9fff/205311244/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c20/5fca0d19/78239764/291c9ffe/205311244/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c20/5fca0d19/78239764/291c9ff2/205311244/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "". Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info "".

name: Ed Markey
subject: Can you add your name to say you endorse my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
To win in 2020, we're going to need a grassroots movement once again. | |
---
| Friends -

Serving you in the U.S. Senate is the honor of a lifetime.

Growing up as the son of a milkman in Malden, I never imagined that I'd have the privilege to fight for our shared values within the walls of Congress.

I know I did not get here alone. Every success in my life has been a result of the people who supported me along the way -- from my parents to friends like you.

To win in 2020, we're going to need a grassroots movement once again. I need to know if you're with us.

**[Will you add your name to personally endorse my re-election campaign today? The only way we can win this race is if we do it together.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df33/693b8b0a/438e9277/72de7ccf/645203674/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTMtYiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em191213-b")**

I know this will not be easy. We've got two opponents who are mounting serious challenges.

But I will not back down. This moment is too important for our progressive agenda.

Together, we can pass the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, a $15/hour minimum wage, and so much more.

But I need you to help me stay in those fights in the U.S. Senate. Are you in?

**[Add your name right now to endorse my re-election campaign. Our work is just getting started, and we need as many people standing together as possible in order to win.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df33/693b8b0a/438e9277/72de7ccf/645203674/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTMtYiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em191213-b")**

It's an honor to have so many people like you on this team. We're going to do big things together.

Thank you,

Ed
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df33/693b8b0a/438e9277/72de7ccf/645203674/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTMtYiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em191213-b")**

---

body:
| |

| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba918/134673f2/9100dad/6997898e/2071247786/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and we've got some work to do.

[We've gotten on more than a dozen state ballots, opened new offices, and hired more field staff, but we need to raise another $30,000 by Sunday night if we're going to keep building at the pace we need to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba918/134673f2/9100dad/6997898d/2071247786/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

name: Team Scholten
subject: Driving Steve King out of office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

Since launching our campaign in August, the momentum has only grown. We’re seeing excitement every day from new and old faces at our town halls, growing our staff and volunteers, and continuing to get out there directly to the people.

On our “Don’t Forget About Us” tour, we’ve traveled with J.D. to towns of 1,000 people or less -- and later today, we’ll have finished our 29th town hall.

We’ve been on the road so much that we’ve worn down our campaign vehicle of choice: Sioux City Sue. Our Winnebago RV (made in the district!) is in the shop for repairs -- and we need your help to fix our ride.

**[Can you pitch in $5 or more to J.D.’s campaign today to make sure we can hit the road in Sioux City Sue come 2020?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12836296/132497450/-690034814?refcode=em19_191213_midmonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjcwZmRiNS1lZjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB4VAUaOkYAqXaVaQNl4Qz9kRKwzagUzq81S7s2FWpE=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12836297/132497452/-690034814?refcode=em19_191213_midmonth1&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjcwZmRiNS1lZjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB4VAUaOkYAqXaVaQNl4Qz9kRKwzagUzq81S7s2FWpE=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12836298/132497454/-690034814?refcode=em19_191213_midmonth1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjcwZmRiNS1lZjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB4VAUaOkYAqXaVaQNl4Qz9kRKwzagUzq81S7s2FWpE=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12836301/132497461/-690034814?refcode=em19_191213_midmonth1&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjcwZmRiNS1lZjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB4VAUaOkYAqXaVaQNl4Qz9kRKwzagUzq81S7s2FWpE=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12836302/132497463/-690034814?refcode=em19_191213_midmonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjcwZmRiNS1lZjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB4VAUaOkYAqXaVaQNl4Qz9kRKwzagUzq81S7s2FWpE=)
Talking with voters at each campaign stop, we know that we can get over the finish line this time to defeat Steve King and elect J.D.

Steve King has left our district behind. He spends his time tweeting conspiracy theories, taking away rights from marginalized groups, and spreading messages of hate and fear.

Our friends and neighbors have had enough -- instead of hate and harm, they want solutions and a representative who will work to put those solutions into action.

J.D. has shown that he is the candidate that will listen and will stand tall for all -- and that won’t stop when he’s elected.

Our goal is to get Sioux City Sue back on the road for 2020 so we can meet with as many voters as possible -- that’s why we need to raise $3,000 to finish the needed repairs.

**[Please, contribute $5 or more right now to make sure our foot is on the gas pedal from now through Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12836303/132497465/-690034814?refcode=em19_191213_midmonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjcwZmRiNS1lZjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB4VAUaOkYAqXaVaQNl4Qz9kRKwzagUzq81S7s2FWpE=)**

Thanks for supporting us getting back on the road!

\-- Team Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12836304/132497467/-690034814?refcode=em19_191213_midmonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjcwZmRiNS1lZjFkLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB4VAUaOkYAqXaVaQNl4Qz9kRKwzagUzq81S7s2FWpE=)

J.D. has shown that he is the candidate that will listen and will stand tall for all -- and that won’t stop when he’s elected. Our goal is to get Sioux City Sue back on the road for 2020 so we can meet with as many voters as possible -- that’s why we need to raise $3,000 to finish the needed repairs. = Thanks for supporting us getting back on the road! \-- Team Scholten =

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: Winning takes work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Three months into the campaign, we have worked hard to bring representation back to this district. There's a long road ahead, but we will win if we keep up the work.
|
---

| | **We launched this campaign just three months ago, friends.** From registering voters with the Monmouth County Young Democrats and the Monmouth Black American Caucus... ... To knocking on doors... ... And phone banking for local candidates ahead of the November elections... Our campaign has been about working alongside volunteers and talking to voters to bring meaningful change to Mercer, Monmouth, and Ocean counties. There's a long road ahead in this campaign, but I know we will win because we will put in the hard work week after week, month after month. So, from the bottom of my heart, thank you for all your support. It means the world to our campaign. \- Stephanie | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff093/522d4087/7afc53d4/4f341772/4201071896/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191213_em")**
---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: LEGISLATIVE UPDATE: Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee Again Blocks Federal Education Grant
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzEwMjEzNDQ5Mzg0NDY2MDEwJmM9YzRuNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDE5MDI3NDQmZD1oMXU5ZTRo.tTfec0GzIA_CjTlFwTR5jS4mBicMgvWsOipfctegzZg)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Today, Democrats on the Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee unanimously rejected an agenda item to accept and expend $46 million for public charter schools in New Hampshire. Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse (R-Salem) issued the following statement: “Rejecting $46 million in education funding from Washington puts New Hampshire students at a disadvantage,” said Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse (R-Salem). “Increasing funding for an adequate education has not been an easy task, but when $46 million for education was offered by the federal government, and with more than 1,300 New Hampshire students on waiting lists for spots at charter schools, it is disappointing that some of my colleagues turned it down, jeopardizing the educational opportunities of these children.” “We as a legislature are better than this, but unfortunately today, politics got in the way of our children’s success,” Morse added. After the vote, Governor Sununu stated that he was "sickened by the vote" and that the Democrats "must explain to every single student why they rejected an unprecedented $46M grant for public schools." We couldn't agree more.
---

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: He's voting to impeach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|

COLIN ALLRED: "I INTEND TO VOTE 'YES.'"

Peter,
If there was any remaining doubt, it's now official: Colin Allred is a puppet of Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and the far left.
After partisan impeachment hearings in which Democrats presented no real evidence, impeachment is growing increasingly unpopular with Americans. Despite that, Colin Allred has thrown his hat in with the CNN/MSNBC crowd.

December is the most important fundraising month thus far for a couple of reasons:

* The final FEC deadline is December 31 -- this is our last chance to show our campaign's strength on our public fundraising report before people start caucusing and voting.
* We're using every donation we receive in December to build out a robust organizing program heading into 2020 -- the start of our election year.

**Here's the thing: we just launched a mid-month goal to ensure that we're staying on track to make December our strongest fundraising month yet. It's essential that we hit this goal by Sunday.**

[**Can we rely on you to make your first donation today to ensure that we hit this critical mid-month fundraising goal? A contribution today will also get our movement one step closer to reaching _one million_ grassroots donors.**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM54F_MMG_GOL_T_20191213_V1S3_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM54F_MMG_GOL_T_20191213_V1S3_P_T2)

Peter,

I knew this year would fly by.

In just a couple weeks, we will ring in the new year and then it’s official: campaign season is in full swing!

The left is going to be more prepared than ever. They’re hyped up on their impeachment hearings and media appearances and they’re taking EVERY opportunity to sell their far left, socialist agenda to the American people.

We need to be prepared to stand up! **That's why I wanted to personally invite you to be an exclusive 2020 FOUNDING MEMBER of my campaign by making a contribution today. **
[ **BECOME AN EARLY SUPPORTER: $10** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=4d283699a9e14e81b0cd59402ed816d1&_e=9EHafJN0jYbaPAXKrucZigr184ivQMUmVY4nkNCUdKkvfxh_gMHL6eOSEiKwoa59FN0veC49rfmbEqyjnzakcj1KtEJTdrxiAwwu6qJgCBEoab8J1F_rRiIKc77TI6mUEEzA7rXYV2QXHZEJitxL2pqh8Kvfqf3Whb49Oq6VaIw5myiZQxjC5z23kviSi-rJfiNdITK_eJDKf_PddLHJ3b7AETFtLz5jRcl8G-AxzIKM1yY6L6EzZFdqdYOfd1Zf9ntAWvxjAwUhzpnZzKighFwyd_65FDpZq94zobxCmHnYOHknAB8ZDWgT8RYxT3cQ4-F1yk5WacsqmUqroUid_A9wlzKOWo0FIIufY5fnJeLWWxe_b4hdWwWVQkurwPjfwAlGie_Xf-BL_BmPI59aaecCvKtY8DSkze8mp2720sh3hGNZJk04O7w_JDNnGNn-)
I have spent my entire career standing up to and exposing corrupt banana republic dictators around the world. Now, we’re facing politicians who want to bring that corruption to America.

It’s unbelievable to witness. They peddle the EXACT same radical, socialist agenda that has ruined countries from which many of us escaped.

**All while so called “leaders” like Donna Shalala stand by.**

It’s clear that we cannot afford to lose in 2020. It’s not just politics, it’s about the future of our entire nation.

I want to save America from socialist destruction, Peter, and I need supporters like you to join me now as we head into this VERY important election year.

**[>>Yes, I will be an early supporter >> ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=4d283699a9e14e81b0cd59402ed816d1&_e=9EHafJN0jYbaPAXKrucZigr184ivQMUmVY4nkNCUdKkvfxh_gMHL6eOSEiKwoa59QpwDyNaa_A9g8WkOS3_-Bum0JktZQ9PjmqbFq9EI2ac1neds0GguXSPEg9RfVmPcateXLSNQ-ZfzCp_g0v1X3urtB0Il4bEu9vWU9bnp57HV01gneTXmzW96rmnCSKJKUDSMI5X3acXbT3S9MYMWC1eqw-ozLGcceSpbHR_Uga541aYM4dW6tPbSBQGyPeUo_6uU2nK0b1x5FyVFvGH7A3OHoxR0yLA6pc_34e0N20KoN8J7CRMELhN9iP53kRpl-Ba0T7VzaQ0-mcEmma7D47ymdAstdnXkU83kx_-dfQc2JcH68620Q80W1mD-b5nsXugk09qLmnOHRw1xIeT1aUq1Hp2SgRKRiePWTJ0Dc8k%3D)**

Peter, not everyone will be able to join me today, but I know you're among the most committed supporters. I'm really counting on you as we prepare for a tough fight.

Thank you,
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=4d283699a9e14e81b0cd59402ed816d1&_e=9EHafJN0jYbaPAXKrucZigr184ivQMUmVY4nkNCUdKkvfxh_gMHL6eOSEiKwoa59QpwDyNaa_A9g8WkOS3_-Bum0JktZQ9PjmqbFq9EI2ac1neds0GguXSPEg9RfVmPcateXLSNQ-ZfzCp_g0v1X3urtB0Il4bEu9vWU9bnp57HV01gneTXmzW96rmnCSKJKUDSMI5X3acXbT3S9MYMWC8KK1rSucVNuT9Pgi49Wh6jGo9mysMjDv_H29ZphVORNXoPHCpl18BLDK2N78-mAbF82IUtwrFvWoYJ1y2hn0guCN-YsYER4TmfrHQaoP7XM7HlsqufoqvVR48Ng0Q52yNrAN_tK1OOZei8ZhsEbBnH8_X0icdLQeNnaprsv9vRI92uexQcxlaDiC3Sz_suKVEfWoY74ZeECwj_l1eyVT6E%3D)

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's secret weapon to winning: voter apathy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. But if Democrats fail to show up to vote in 2020, Trump will win again, we'll lose our House majority, and Mitch McConnell will maintain control of the Senate. If Trump wins re-election, he'll grow increasingly unhinged. Kids in cages, the Muslim Ban, tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations, withdrawal from the Paris climate accords, calling white supremacists "very fine people," and calling his impeachment a "lynching." That all will look tame. Trump will stack the Supreme Court with more lifetime appointments, more justices like Brett Kavanaugh. Trump will gut the EPA. He'll destroy Obamacare and defund Medicare and Social Security in favor of more and more tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations. Our mission at When Democrats Turn Out is to prevent a repeat of the 2016 election by educating voters in key swing states. Our mission is to support every single key Senate battleground race and dozens of House candidates. Our mission is to beat Trump in 2020. But right now, we're falling VERY short of our fundraising goals. If we can't raise another $2,000 today, we'll need to significantly scale back our strategy in 2020. We do not accept corporate contributions or contributions from Big Oil, Big Banks, or Big Pharma. Our work is 100% funded by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. Our work is funded by you. Peter, if you care about stopping Trump, electing a Democrat to the White House in 2020, and removing Mitch McConnell from power, then please, we're asking you to please donate $5 or more immediately to support our work turning out voters, stopping GOP voter suppression, taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell, and getting Trump out of the White House. [**Can you give just $5 now?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf46/6e9863e8/1738b3c5/1db0b7c6/4079352426/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191213a.ND&refcode2=SNDs1cJtPtrtTP5gorAx") Your help is critical to pushing back and winning in 2020. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf46/6e9863e8/1738b3c5/1db0b7c6/4079352426/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191213a.ND&refcode2=SNDs1cJtPtrtTP5gorAx")

body:
We win with people power, and we build people power at the doors. Join us! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6e17deae9d28/always-be-canvassing?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=6295903ba9&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | Hi ,
Last weekend our campaign teamed up with Bernie Sanders supporters and Austin DSA, and **we mobilized over a hundred people to knock 2,500 doors in a single day**. This kind of momentum is built by organizing around the interests of the working class and showing up to our shared fights with everything we've got.
---
|
---
Over a hundred of our neighbors canvassed for us & Bernie Sanders!
| We know this victory will be earned through a diligent and deliberate organizing of the most energized supporters into work that reaches our working class base. **One of the most crucial ways to reach our people is to canvass** \- bringing our message to thousands and thousands of people at their doors.

Join us in this movement-building work. We have every intention of topping a hundred people before the end of this campaign, and we must bring more of our neighbors into the fold to beat that goal. **Friday Night Speed Canvass**
Friday Dec. 13 from 4:30-7pm @ Quack’s 43rd St Bakery

Saturday Dec. 14 from 1-4pm @ Warren Park, Burleson, TX

In solidarity,
Team Heidi

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: I’m tired of the political games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
EXPOSED: Anthony Brindisi claims to be fighting Spectrum, but he worked with Governor Cuomo to raise Upstate New Yorkers’ internet bills. | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4cacdaebb538409db19c2f16165078ef&_e=Ct_afIJxFiwaOi7i611yJzA-wF2pa2gjo19ivbsK6osMz3zB7KfNphYAfWaj5PGWNnuwR9cbXuB1LSuq4PLpZUqgniJYaMVjHy1BfqD38zmGf5h6bRB4VPd6VM7NxWazESuRDhkvVRWWQeyvD6dOH2n3r-5cTQfOEerxD5yagKD9x70aCTNgmOQoaLtogBDpL5zVsC1OvTo2sJfOUh_sv-sAtgnigOBAaRNGLUbvjKx4oPejG9xbJT6bp_h2cRqCI40lgrTU-F4VqnDGRJos4Plr8vZxKZ0FQAbtTwU1fA5bkm-MSAh1peh6fd9Vz4QaKHJoIMhJ-16hf_FCdGmhv0CVGnDIaY9H_2e47rRTmSR1sBuL_2DZjF7DfPli2PylPYxe6SE3YrJMExDIMi7gPGVUJJWbLH1BOmIoJBYLUxU4nCCYQjaGl7Em68CBwman)
|
---
Peter, this is big.

Anthony Brindisi claims to be fighting to lower your cable bill and increase your internet speeds, but there’s an important piece of the story he’s not telling you.

When he was in the New York State Assembly, Brindisi worked with Governor Cuomo to advance the Time Warner/Charter merger. Now, he’s pretending to fight to lower your cable bill WHILE DOING NOTHING IN CONGRESS.

**Stand up to Brindisi and Cuomo’s political games.**
[ **STAND UP TO BRINDISI AND CUOMO** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4cacdaebb538409db19c2f16165078ef&_e=Ct_afIJxFiwaOi7i611yJzA-wF2pa2gjo19ivbsK6osMz3zB7KfNphYAfWaj5PGWNnuwR9cbXuB1LSuq4PLpZUqgniJYaMVjHy1BfqD38zmGf5h6bRB4VPd6VM7NxWazESuRDhkvVRWWQeyvD6dOH2n3r-5cTQfOEerxD5yagKD9x70aCTNgmOQoaLtogBDpL5zVsC1OvTo2sJfOUh_sv-sAtgnigOBAaRNGLUbvjKwEksaA-HUAkvLgZrwzKnQHrssRA2Sy4Q251TaaBrMSBeijRGGkpJgFAl3EUG5kF6cRDwNj-d53H7UspaEt8HRuUuc_oa6mYSkHgnFUHXHdV1ywh_gJ5x_Hy95SGYIJL0nVCABUx0V7J2Vo9dTvcYS21giRXoswLnRCGyfMjvsnWVTWinZw5m_CRm_leUG6r_xpQNQqUsYQhgtyx4QKEmVX)
Why would they favor such a bad deal? The union bosses that bankrolled their campaigns thought the merger would benefit their members.

This is just one example of Brindisi putting politics before the people of Upstate New York.

As a born-and-raised Upstate New Yorker, I understand what it’s like to be forgotten by our elected officials and used by politicians. That’s why I’m running for Congress, Peter.

**Add you name to show Anthony Brindisi we’re tired of the political games.**
[ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4cacdaebb538409db19c2f16165078ef&_e=Ct_afIJxFiwaOi7i611yJzA-wF2pa2gjo19ivbsK6osMz3zB7KfNphYAfWaj5PGWNnuwR9cbXuB1LSuq4PLpZUqgniJYaMVjHy1BfqD38zmGf5h6bRB4VPd6VM7NxWazESuRDhkvVRWWQeyvD6dOH2n3r-5cTQfOEerxD5yagKD9x70aCTNgmOQoaLtogBDpL5zVsC1OvTo2sJfOUh_sv-sAtgnigOBAaRNGLUbvjKze4zLCrkFF9rGTPk1TUi8Xe24ra3THvBG5IUAUQ6vdA3frdSQR1--eISthxGbaHu-qIwdaEENIfQQk97p11aW5GWOyEl8A3kS2JjJcQnD3qnB5WzNW0cTzr-OPMy2tMtQDdTy4XZmmjUYAG2qLRzDyPObWC7M8W30adLRXfQp7t8Kp2DuFfNwB93CJZq1tldBf9NyKoT4YLFGxGotTml2a)
During Brindisi’s time in Washington, he has delivered nothing for Upstate New York. Instead, he’s voted for impeachment, taxpayer-funded abortions, and gun control measures that would strip us of our Second Amendment rights.

During my time in office, I reformed the tax code to empower individuals and small businesses, secured millions of dollars for fire departments, police departments, and municipal water systems, and delivered pay raises for our troops and reforms to the VA to assist veterans.

With your help, I can continue my work and deliver real results for Upstate New York. **[Let’s show Anthony Brindisi we need real results, not political games.>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4cacdaebb538409db19c2f16165078ef&_e=Ct_afIJxFiwaOi7i611yJzA-wF2pa2gjo19ivbsK6osMz3zB7KfNphYAfWaj5PGWNnuwR9cbXuB1LSuq4PLpZUqgniJYaMVjHy1BfqD38zmGf5h6bRB4VPd6VM7NxWazESuRDhkvVRWWQeyvD6dOH2n3r-5cTQfOEerxD5yagKD9x70aCTNgmOQoaLtogBDpL5zVsC1OvTo2sJfOUh_sv-sAtgnigOBAaRNGLUbvjKxTTXfMmDcE8KHwcfvReXdiGnbjF7gdr0r_sdqgEnhE3zKce14iH1UH-7yFE_sMaGbqdeggk6LrVi0PINOYBlzmEQeztDgFySvy2QyU_XT4zyaWys0qlvwe5nF-s1Xty84RniRvF7w429EbyX0_oa8S-loSO_AEed9sJz4yHE72hgCXyP3FRSGYYEWT4gMusjJU4mDTnSoRa4Y-FEegZysf)**

Thank you,

Claudia Tenney

name: MJ Hegar Campaign HQ
subject: get your special 2020 sticker!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We only have 81 DAYS LEFT until the primary!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906eb/7f51f7bc/4a52f250/4ef0e5a2/3913251711/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | URGENT, Peter:

**There are _less than 100 DAYS LEFT_ until the primary!** We've only got 81 days to keep building this grassroots team to make sure MJ is the candidate who takes on Senator Cornyn in November.

**[Will you pitch in now to become an official 2020 member of our team? Give $5 or more and we'll send you a Team MJ bumper sticker featuring our brand new logo as a thank you!*](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906eb/7f51f7bc/4a52f250/4ef0e5a1/3913251711/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191213.1nd__622__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906eb/7f51f7bc/4a52f250/4ef0e5a1/3913251711/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191213.1nd__622__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Once MJ wins the primary, we'll need the resources to stand up to an endless wave of attack ads from Sen. Cornyn and his special interest allies. **Right now, Sen. Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest.** Our team doesn't need to match him dollar for dollar, but we _do_ need enough to run a winning grassroots campaign!

And that's where you come in, Peter. Unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs. She's relying on your support to power this movement! But this is the last full fundraising quarter before the primary election, and we're running out of time.

Please make your first donation now to join Team MJ and help us build a winning grassroots campaign. If you donate $5 or more we'll send you a special 2020 sticker as a thank you for your support!*
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906eb/7f51f7bc/4a52f250/4ef0e5a0/3913251711/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191213.1nd__622__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906eb/7f51f7bc/4a52f250/4ef0e5a6/3913251711/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191213.1nd__622__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906eb/7f51f7bc/4a52f250/4ef0e5a5/3913251711/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191213.1nd__622__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906eb/7f51f7bc/4a52f250/4ef0e5a4/3913251711/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191213.1nd__622__")**
\-- Team MJ

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
What will happen in 1 week >>
|
---

| | We have a major campaign milestone coming up: The filing deadline for our race is just one week away! After the filing deadline, our race will be locked in and we'll know who our opponents are. [_**We have to be ready for the road ahead, so today, we 're launching a $50,000 Filing Deadline Goal. Will you chip in to help us reach it?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d1/3d199a51/2f20792f/7364e5e1/470132879/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxMiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191212?refcode=kme191212_nd_other&refcode2=17426") We might not know who all of our opponents are yet, but we do know this: This is going to be a tough race. North Carolina's new congressional maps make the 6th District _more competitive than ever_. It's going to be a huge pick-up opportunity for 2020. We need to be prepared to run a strong campaign that can overcome the odds. [_**So if you can, please contribute to help reach our $50,000 goal before the filing deadline.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d1/3d199a51/2f20792f/7364e5e1/470132879/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxMiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191212?refcode=kme191212_nd_other&refcode2=17426") Thank you, Kathy | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3d1/3d199a51/2f20792f/7364e5e1/470132879/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxMiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191212?refcode=kme191212_nd_other&refcode2=17426")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?
