Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b1/3eb3e2fc/6973c7fa/744ee04a/2900935897/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191213_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191213_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is the last time I'll ask for over three months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Today's the day -- this is our last day before the freeze.
| | [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8386?t=3&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ) | [CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8386?t=4&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---
Friend,
This is it: Our freeze deadline is at midnight. Tonight. _No more fundraising for more than three months._
[**So this is the last time I'll ask for over three months, and I ask because it couldn't be more important. We're less than $5,000 away from our goal of $50,000 in grassroots donations: Will you donate $1 or more right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8386?t=6&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8387?t=7&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8388?t=8&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8389?t=9&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8390?t=10&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8391?t=11&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8392?t=12&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---
This race is not in the bag. It's not tied up. It's not certain. And while my campaign _can't_ raise a single dollar until spring, my Republican opponents _can_ raise against me.
The Republican Governors Association only has to worry about eleven races in 2020. The bulk of them are Republican-held -- and there are just three Democratic incumbents they can take out. I'm one of them.
Since 2017, the RGA has raised more than $186 million, and they'd love to help ANY of my six GOP opponents beat me next fall. All while we're sitting out and losing out on more than three months of fundraising.
More than three in five Washingtonians disapprove of Donald Trump's job performance, but you can bet the Washington GOP and my Republican opponents will be front and center at every rally in the state from here until Election Day -- and we're losing out on more than three months of fundraising. _This is what we're up against._
[**This deadline is very real, and that's why I'm asking for your help: Donate $1 or more before tonight's midnight deadline, and let's raise $50,000 to keep my campaign warm through the freeze.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8386?t=14&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8386?t=15&akid=8013%2E868730%2EaavwGQ)
---

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year U.S. military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. name: Matt
subject: re: Gary's petition protecting the ACA (need you)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
time's running out

---
| | |
---
Hi friend - Gary has always fought for affordable health care, but right now, Trump and his administration are actively supporting a lawsuit that could end the Affordable Care Act for good.
We're over 90% of the way to our petition goal, but time's running out: **Please, will you sign our petition demanding Congress protect affordable health care? Here's the best link: [https://petitions.signforgood.com/GP-healthcare-petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/GP-healthcare-petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk164-ot-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-healthcare-ja%3Fcode%3Djtk164-ot-nd")**
Thanks so much.

Matt Phelan \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gary
Date: Sat, Dec 07, 2019
Subject: I need 9 signers from Cresco
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daac0/5721a3ed/71bae3ec/efaa974/3802587992/VEsE/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend,
More than 20 million Americans gained health insurance when the Affordable Care Act was signed into law nearly a decade ago. But for the first time since the law's passage, new government figures show that the number of uninsured Americans is on the rise.

In fact, compared to 2017, there were two million more Americans who lacked health insurance in 2018 - and while it's an outrage, it's not exactly shocking. Donald Trump is actively supporting a lawsuit that could end the ACA for good. The Trump administration has encouraged states to make it more difficult for people to prove they're eligible for Medicaid.

Millions of Americans and Michiganders benefit from the ACA - whether it's through the health insurance they get or by being protected from discrimination based on a preexisting condition. That's why I'm fighting any and all Republican attempts to weaken or dismantle the law.
I'm looking for 10,000 folks to sign on to make your voice heard: [**_Please sign this petition to demand Congress protect affordable health care. The number of insured in this country should be going up, not down. If you agree, sign your name now._** ](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/GP-healthcare-petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk164-ot-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-healthcare-ja%3Fcode%3Djtk164-ot-nd")

In the decade that the ACA's been law, millions more Americans have been able to afford routine doctor's visits. The fact that we see that trend reversing under President Trump is deeply disturbing. It's immoral, even. We can't let that trend continue.
I was proud to vote for health care reform during my time in the House, and I'll fight with everything I have to defend the ACA in the Senate. But the buck doesn't stop with me. The GOP is attacking affordable health care from every angle - in the courts, in Congress and through the power of the presidency.

**[_That 's where you come in, friend. Please add your name now to demand Congress protect affordable health care._](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/GP-healthcare-petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk164-ot-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-healthcare-ja%3Fcode%3Djtk164-ot-nd")**
Thanks,

Gary
| | [Sign the petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/GP-healthcare-petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk164-ot-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-healthcare-ja%3Fcode%3Djtk164-ot-nd")
---

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Impeachment is the only option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390919/55b66746/2d6a5db1/80f078c/2762597473/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| |
It's official: Next week the house will formally -- finally -- vote on impeachment. The debate this week (and the President's conduct since the very first day he took office) made it clear that there isn't anything that will deter him from additional wrongdoing as long as he's in office.
**There is no other option. We're at the end of this road. The only way to stop Donald Trump from abusing his office is to remove him from it.**
This president has violated our Constitution and our conscience almost daily - not just by obstructing justice and inviting foreign interference in our election, but by profiting off the presidency, encouraging political violence, endangering us all with egomaniacal posturing, attacking the free press, giving comfort to white supremacists, tearing apart families and throwing them in cages.
This president has abused our country's trust, he's broken our laws, and he's made it abundantly clear that he intends to keep doing it.
**Impeachment is the only remaining option that we, the people, have to defend the integrity of our democracy.** **** [Donate](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390919/55b66746/2d6a5db1/80f078d/2762597473/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-13-impeach&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---

PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

This president has violated our Constitution and our conscience almost daily - not just by obstructing justice and inviting foreign interference in our election, but by profiting off the presidency, encouraging political violence, endangering us all with egomaniacal posturing, attacking the free press, giving comfort to white supremacists, tearing apart families and throwing them in cages. This president has abused our country's trust, he's broken our laws, and he's made it abundantly clear that he intends to keep doing it. Impeachment is the only remaining option that we, the people, have to defend the integrity of our democracy. ** "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by ""**. PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? "". If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, "" Questions or concerns? "". |

[The News & Review: _Sharing Her Vision _](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2xi/o2YlTMyxSpCr2z3ywQtjFg/h2/t45hLnMAV-2Fti-2ByEjm5w8flDapDZ-2BML65s0w4GGMCZ9lMctt09-2FgQV-2FGMnHwmfPNI-2BRnCo-2Bgq17qFm5mOPq25DjNf7xFhJbsJQ4Wr0O82b-2FXGZ20aImq1KHcWfeO8zsSNs8CiWk4OR9TFcpdTnauxYm8xKswZoTx1EmcfYly14En4v-2BYXCDgcOVw-2BvD11XHPKLWb5Rz6vwp-2FzDwA2xJDql4q5yGNu8yZXJIBh17Po4XFcgo56d5Zz1ovLBdefkku8AZVvg7B2ZOljYQO0HefwbsOA4R7sWfZLHlDVRCPN7q44SE0KiuukPdTG-2Bb4v7Q-2BCGtjZc7-2FFo3UNbJpfyCYLWmgVrstETjWwr-2Bt-2B7OQnBPwFiVO8lDjCSEpQvh9XrOnJhzS3lPuZRHZIBJirdQl2WP-2BzpCwDc6oecaNdwby88jQ3ki1zlCDonxic0JdtBkO3LwZkfpHPUtTHN61cZ-2FwKbPhQjyBWox0fp-2FEtD1hWqaIBEPq5En1nz8udylJT8N9-2B/Clpx) "I'm running because I have a vision, a vision for this country and a vision for our district that we can lead the transition to renewable energy, that our communities need investment and job creation and industries in renewable energy -- jobs that will last for generations to come," she said. She said while fighting climate change has received more urban support, she believes it's rural areas that can and should benefit most from a clean-energy economy. She said southwestern Oregon's forests, fisheries and agriculture are being harmed, but Douglas County has the resources to turn the problem around and should reap the rewards. "We can lead this transition. We have world class wave energy potential and wind energy potential on our coastline," she said. "We have some of the most important forests here in this district on the planet for cooling the climate. These are tremendous assets that need investment." Making those investments would lead to wealth and lasting prosperity for the communities of District 4, she said, especially for Douglas County. Canning's campaign is 100% financed by individuals. She's refusing any corporate donors. Read more in the [Roseburg News and Review.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2xi/o2YlTMyxSpCr2z3ywQtjFg/h3/t45hLnMAV-2Fti-2ByEjm5w8flDapDZ-2BML65s0w4GGMCZ9lMctt09-2FgQV-2FGMnHwmfPNI-2BRnCo-2Bgq17qFm5mOPq25DjNf7xFhJbsJQ4Wr0O82b-2FXGZ20aImq1KHcWfeO8zsSNs8CiWk4OR9TFcpdTnauxYm8xKswZoTx1EmcfYly14En4v-2BYXCDgcOVw-2BvD11XHPKLWb5Rz6vwp-2FzDwA2xJDql4q5yGNu8yZXJIBh17Po4XFcgo56d5Zz1ovLBdefkku8AZVvg7B2ZOljYQO0HefwbsOA4R7sWfZLHlDVRCPN7q5nvv70hbk4Iq-2BzKUNlSHpCEoUuJbX7NNw6a3XeWoD-2BSl7imnMb1INvapqh-2Bnn-2BZoNJ4fusH-2Ba7vMf172wwxti7-2BtFFW8daU8iS1DeAWMGLUwKJrJ8SR0oH3AxgI2Ij-2Fx4y03cpthSVwULXsqmf1qafT9yo1liLbw5f5lvuviRz5iyZoSSu9M-2BDB3ycIgEylwIGBylkP2Z93n67sBtvpiJS/_9NU)

[The Daily Barometer: _Sunrise Movement, community protest with the goal to stand up against climate change_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2xi/o2YlTMyxSpCr2z3ywQtjFg/h4/DYxHceek-2BbBwDHNV0TQe8-2FbCEtFavX3mKj5CdY9-2Fb-2BuJgFP9fNLzvJYHTK3ZTWkbIW1Y4dauL1whYmsNADG7Orn9vkL0JoALHzrV4MKSsslg8aLLVmN2Kt8Jguqt-2F-2Bg-2BKqruDrQNdUtk86xbdJCY1-2B4PH0plpk7azEq3e1Byocts1Ht1k4qacjoai-2Fx8I3BdEWcRRjtYekqR2hPjraOG7atE-2B4dV4P-2BfVaRCVqv0v2Pv9ufecbElyycEyWIZp0OmMbcuLnDN6XVUIGmfJfndw7xhGo8o-2B-2BZKJtWAtG6qo-2BqBWOmg8f9Na5XCMsTAoIdU1o9LxjkfuNfxgIdANI07HBiHja8I7t2Cfz87oCBsFxDqPReAcF6CVqOdnyh2a2z7RCeh93atIVkGCAvCexQzBwHA67b8VDUTn-2BS5WSXYwEM-3D/IR2-) "I'm here to support Sunrise Corvallis and their call for OSU to keep their commitment to go carbon neutral by 2025, without tuition hikes that hurt students," Canning said. Canning is running for Congress to support the Green New Deal, a vision of federal investment to transition the country off of fossil fuels permanently, supported by the Sunrise Movement. "Today, we are proving that when grassroots candidates march shoulder to shoulder with movements and mobilize voters, incumbents pay attention because they know their job is in jeopardy," Canning said. "Our movement is putting fossil fuels, fracking and pipeline projects like Jordan Cove at the top of the agenda for 2020, because a livable planet is on the line. That's why I'm running, and I'll never take a dime from the polluting industries that have destabilized our climate." Read More in [The Daily Barometer](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2xi/o2YlTMyxSpCr2z3ywQtjFg/h5/DYxHceek-2BbBwDHNV0TQe8-2FbCEtFavX3mKj5CdY9-2Fb-2BuJgFP9fNLzvJYHTK3ZTWkbIW1Y4dauL1whYmsNADG7Orn9vkL0JoALHzrV4MKSsslg8aLLVmN2Kt8Jguqt-2F-2Bg-2BKqruDrQNdUtk86xbdJCY1-2B4PH0plpk7azEq3e1Byocts1Ht1k4qacjoai-2Fx8I3BdEWcRRjtYekqR2hPjraOG7U0iT7KmQVqLaV2HHScQbZUgMHck3NPStgB8d1gAt1-2F9W-2FV9AwSVl7MCiu6m7coZCQL-2B84h4JeABgq5pZgFkw9-2BSvgrNQ3g7m3LNqCCLo7-2Bo5ZsFFVAXVVaGk4JatUh-2Ft204zt2b40aKaPKjMHL1NbNQyxWgMmuaxFTBaY2KlEJzw3rTI24o-2B8AdDyi1liFdQ2t0Q6k1MRFZ6EjyUxtx2uY-3D/w9VZ).

[The News & Review: _DeFazio Opposes Jordan Cove project _](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2xi/o2YlTMyxSpCr2z3ywQtjFg/h6/t45hLnMAV-2Fti-2ByEjm5w8ft3pM7RbbKn0jPL-2FAMVKfmYZFJ-2BiAKCZScG3KOnaes0t6IqYMWOotz6yiaMsHSA63qVcxa4hhE4AqMidMs3CFP7EfZ1csizd5Lni362nH8kv9li5GxLC9dhYxWptayJTLQqhxQvKBLPqv91-2B7q9Hr8P8tg8QmcUoGrj94qqw36h-2BnQcEEwimH2TQbnQW4-2BnO8AHL13mqs-2F88hC0JvhYYJQG3eQ611HDPrGz8jVsk2VOkSsx-2FqPSH0eB-2FYQRcwlUzBqWzPkM5BWYD0tKnA0I8bo1De0U1lTH4jaj-2Fo3-2BFWwY26AANucMWPkxZWE0L-2FwsjZfIUV-2FnXHDj7r-2BG269NYKNz2fQVS22st-2BkITE20VMmqW4N29NUil9n0pR9mDIPkDog-3D-3D/Zfbx) U.S. Rep. Peter DeFazio, D-Springfield, announced to supporters last week he's opposed to the Jordan Cove and Pacific Connector Pipeline project. The proposed pipeline would carry natural gas across four Oregon counties, including Douglas, to a proposed Jordan Cove liquefaction plant in Coos Bay. The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission is expected to make a decision on the project in February. The project has generated opposition from environmentalists and from landowners in the pipeline's proposed path who fear eminent domain will be used to allow the pipeline to cross their properties. It's also been opposed by Doyle Canning, the Eugene Democrat who's mounted a primary challenge for DeFazio's District 4 congressional seat... Canning's campaign followed DeFazio's announcement with a charge that it comes from feeling the pressure of the competition. Canning has made climate change a central issue in her campaign and has been endorsed by the Sunrise Movement in Corvallis and the national climate group 350 Action. "Today we are proving that when grassroots candidates march shoulder to shoulder with movements and mobilize voters, incumbents pay attention because they know their job is in jeopardy," Canning said in a written statement. "Our movement is putting fossil fuels, fracking, and pipeline projects like Jordan Cove at the top of the agenda for 2020, because a livable planet is on the line." Read More at the [Roseburg News and Review. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2xi/o2YlTMyxSpCr2z3ywQtjFg/h7/t45hLnMAV-2Fti-2ByEjm5w8ft3pM7RbbKn0jPL-2FAMVKfmYZFJ-2BiAKCZScG3KOnaes0t6IqYMWOotz6yiaMsHSA63qVcxa4hhE4AqMidMs3CFP7EfZ1csizd5Lni362nH8kv9li5GxLC9dhYxWptayJTLQqhxQvKBLPqv91-2B7q9Hr8P8tg8QmcUoGrj94qqw36h-2BtHY4wu63hVqdMa-2B9EykOrgK-2FBjF8HgRKDafekSiNHF29741XOJf-2FgLswpx5qUxU-2FbQ1kGiCpnYS9Y-2BdaTU3IWS-2BiaA7rrhAgaUKq0Vx-2BfmePRzmakgawLD6ZHVfzxY8yFrUSGguUqmRj0ieE0ut12da-2FKaWK-2BodxNGPOVb-2BcmE7joueACbsmpyh-2BKNmhLn59V5cpW-2F0ZJnAwRBa0RfcAMw-3D-3D/mVsz)

Brunch served, Kids eat free. Canning for Congress HQ 1492 West 6th Ave, Eugene Please join us for our final fundraiser of the year, a family-friendly holiday party at HQ. Our dedicated volunteers will be serving up scrambled eggs, coffee, fruit salad, rice crispy treats, gingerbread cake and more. A fiddle-playing Santa Claus will stop by from 10:30 - 12 to play some tunes for supporters of all ages! Holiday Pajama Competition Don your cutest morning attire and be ready for some fierce competition as we will be giving out prizes to the most adorable and the most entertaining holiday themed PJs! Kids Snowflake Making Workshop Don't let the little ones miss out! We will keep them entertained by decorating the office with fun snowflakes! | | IN THE NEWS | "I'm running because I have a vision, a vision for this country and a vision for our district that we can lead the transition to renewable energy, that our communities need investment and job creation and industries in renewable energy -- jobs that will last for generations to come," she said. She said while fighting climate change has received more urban support, she believes it's rural areas that can and should benefit most from a clean-energy economy. She said southwestern Oregon's forests, fisheries and agriculture are being harmed, but Douglas County has the resources to turn the problem around and should reap the rewards. "We can lead this transition. We have world class wave energy potential and wind energy potential on our coastline," she said. "We have some of the most important forests here in this district on the planet for cooling the climate. These are tremendous assets that need investment." Making those investments would lead to wealth and lasting prosperity for the communities of District 4, she said, especially for Douglas County. Canning's campaign is 100% financed by individuals. She's refusing any corporate donors. Read more in the | - "I'm here to support Sunrise Corvallis and their call for OSU to keep their commitment to go carbon neutral by 2025, without tuition hikes that hurt students," Canning said. Canning is running for Congress to support the Green New Deal, a vision of federal investment to transition the country off of fossil fuels permanently, supported by the Sunrise Movement. "Today, we are proving that when grassroots candidates march shoulder to shoulder with movements and mobilize voters, incumbents pay attention because they know their job is in jeopardy," Canning said. "Our movement is putting fossil fuels, fracking and pipeline projects like Jordan Cove at the top of the agenda for 2020, because a livable planet is on the line. That's why I'm running, and I'll never take a dime from the polluting industries that have destabilized our climate." Read More in . | U.S. Rep. Peter DeFazio, D-Springfield, announced to supporters last week he's opposed to the Jordan Cove and Pacific Connector Pipeline project. The proposed pipeline would carry natural gas across four Oregon counties, including Douglas, to a proposed Jordan Cove liquefaction plant in Coos Bay. The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission is expected to make a decision on the project in February. The project has generated opposition from environmentalists and from landowners in the pipeline's proposed path who fear eminent domain will be used to allow the pipeline to cross their properties. It's also been opposed by Doyle Canning, the Eugene Democrat who's mounted a primary challenge for DeFazio's District 4 congressional seat... Canning's campaign followed DeFazio's announcement with a charge that it comes from feeling the pressure of the competition. Canning has made climate change a central issue in her campaign and has been endorsed by the Sunrise Movement in Corvallis and the national climate group 350 Action. "Today we are proving that when grassroots candidates march shoulder to shoulder with movements and mobilize voters, incumbents pay attention because they know their job is in jeopardy," Canning said in a written statement. "Our movement is putting fossil fuels, fracking, and pipeline projects like Jordan Cove at the top of the agenda for 2020, because a livable planet is on the line." subject: Unprecedented arc
body:
Governor Holcomb continues to make history. This week, he laid out his 2020 Next Level Agenda (read more about that below), which is earning accolades

View this email in your browser (https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f62b50c7e5)

Unprecedented Arc

Governor Holcomb continues to make history. This week, he laid out his 2020 Next Level Agenda (read more about that below), which is earning accolades for its focus on promoting the health and safety of Hoosiers, as well as addressing many of the concerns of Hoosier educators. And as we begin to look toward the end of 2019, Governor Holcomb is making history with his campaign as well. As Howey Politics Indiana described it (https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/Horse-Race-Holcomb-reelect-continues-on-historic-arc-/-3/346/22636?mc_cid=f62b50c7e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , it truly is an “unprecedented arc.”

That’s because Governor Holcomb’s campaign, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch’s campaign and your Indiana Republican Party will have a higher year-end cash-on-hand balance – both combined and individually – than any other Indiana governor going into their re-election year. Combined, these three entities currently have $8.25 million in the bank...and this number could go even higher before we officially close the books on 2019.

I said it in Howey Politics Indiana (https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/Horse-Race-Holcomb-reelect-continues-on-historic-arc-/-3/346/22636?mc_cid=f62b50c7e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and I’ll say it here as well: Governor Holcomb’s re-election campaign is hitting on all cylinders. That's because our fundraising, our messaging, and our ground game are in full gear.

When it comes to that ground game, it really launched back in 2018. The party led now-Senator Mike Braun's voter contact campaign, with full-time staff, interns, and volunteers making more than 2.5 million contacts. We flexed that muscle again this year as Governor Holcomb campaigned for mayoral candidates across the state, helping Indiana go from a +7 Republican mayoral advantage to a +23 Republican advantage in city halls. And, of course, this year the team collected the required signatures to get Governor Holcomb on the 2020 ballot in record time.

We’re in perpetual motion, and we’re not stopping now. It truly is an unprecedented arc. Check out the full story here (https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/Horse-Race-Holcomb-reelect-continues-on-historic-arc-/-3/346/22636?mc_cid=f62b50c7e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

-Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: This week, Chairman Hupfer sat down with Howey Politics Indiana publisher Brian Howey for an interview (https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/Horse-Race-Holcomb-reelect-continues-on-historic-arc-/-3/346/22636?mc_cid=f62b50c7e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . We’re all so encouraged by the progress of his recovery, and wish him the best as he continues to heal.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Putting People First: 2020 Agenda Announcement

On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb announced his 2020 Next Level Agenda. His agenda focuses on Putting People First by improving quality of life for Hoosiers across the state.
* Governor Holcomb wants to continue creating a strong and diverse economy by transforming how we tell Indiana’s story, with the goal of attracting more jobs, more talent and more tourism. Governor Holcomb is also going to use Indiana's growing status as a defense hub to triple defense investment in our state.
* Governor Holcomb wants to keep Hoosiers connected with reliable and efficient infrastructure connectivity. That means continuing to connect unserved Hoosiers with broadband access, as well as maintaining our highways and landing more nonstop international flights. Governor Holcomb also wants to keep Hoosiers safe on the road by decreasing distracted driving and enacting a hands-free device driving law.
* Governor Holcomb is continuing to develop a 21st century workforce. One of his top priorities will be finding long-term, sustainable solutions to improve teacher compensation, as well as removing unfunded, burdensome mandates. By retaining and attracting our state's teachers, Hoosier kids will continue receiving the best education to prepare for the future. Governor Holcomb is also dedicated to improving prison education systems to help offenders find success and contribute to the workforce when they re-enter society.
* Governor Holcomb is continuing to improve our state's public health and fight the drug epidemic. The rapid increase in Hoosier youth smoking is alarming, and that's why Governor Holcomb is calling to raise the age to purchase all tobacco products from 18 to 21. The 2020 agenda also includes ways to provide healthcare price transparency, fight the drug epidemic, and continue to work to make Indiana home to the Midwest's lowest infant mortality rate by 2024.
* Governor Holcomb also wants to continue delivering great government service to Hoosiers by saving them over $125 million and simplifying how Hoosiers can reach out for health and human services assistance by integrating the 2-1-1 helpline into FSSA call centers.

Governor Holcomb's 2020 Next Level Agenda continues Putting People First. The five pillars in the Next Level Agenda are forward-thinking solutions to improve the lives of Hoosiers around Indiana!

Congress of Counties: Countdown 7 Weeks!

Countdown seven weeks until Congress of Counties (http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=f62b50c7e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , your Indiana Republican Party’s two-day training and networking event.

We look forward to seeing you in downtown Indianapolis on January 31-February 1 to meet Indiana’s Republican leaders and participate in breakout sessions on important campaign topics like candidate recruitment, fundraising, social media, technology, and more!

If you’re an Indiana Republican, this is an event you’ll want to attend next year! Learn more, and book your registration here (http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=f62b50c7e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's base will be voting on November 3, 2020. Will you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, We're 11 months until Election Day 2020 \-- the day we can stand up and resoundingly say "NO" to Trump, his racism, xenophobia, misogyny, and corruption. When Democrats Turn Out is committed to showing up to the voting booth and marking blue across the ballot, but we can't be the only ones. Trump's name on the ballot will bring out his base in droves \-- so we need to be prepared to fight back. We need to hear from you \-- if you are ready to see positive change across the country, retake the government from corrupt cronies, and restore democracy, add your name to this pledge. [**Pledge to vote on November 3, 2020 >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf48/6e9863e8/173a8a50/1db0b7c8/543408022/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/2020-pledge/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for your commitment to the cause. -The WDTO Team [PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf48/6e9863e8/173a8a50/1db0b7c8/543408022/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/2020-pledge/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: Our opponent voted against Pres. Trump's pro-Israel policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
He was 1 of only 5 Republicans who voted with Adam Schiff, Sharice Davids, and Pelosi's House majority against President Trump's pro-Israel policies. | | | |
---
| | | **Stand with a trusted supporter of Israel and
President Trump**
---
| | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=14f57bc17b&e=1050d051da)
---
Our opponent took an [unbelievable vote last week](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7976306e9d&e=1050d051da) against President Trump's pro-Israel policies. _**He was one of only 5 Republicans who voted with Adam Schiff, Sharice Davids, and Nancy Pelosi's House majority.**_ President Trump and Secretary Pompeo have made it clear they stand with Israel and do not support the passage of HB 327.
---
| | While Steve Watkins worked to undercut President Trump’s policies, Jake LaTurner continues to stand strong in support of Israel and President Trump.

We must send a strong, conservative fighter we can trust to Washington to stand with the President on Israel. Your support is vital in this effort.
[**Any donation you can give makes a difference.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a2836800d3&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| The Republican Jewish Coalition called the resolution a "terrible mistake." Adding, the resolution's purpose is to [“undercut the Trump administration’s Middle East peace plan ahead of its unveiling.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=cf7259ff47&e=1050d051da)
---
| |
---
Prior to becoming Kansas State Treasurer, Jake served as Chairman of the Kansas Senate’s Federal and State Affairs Committee, and one of his last actions as a Chairman was to lay the groundwork for the successful passage of anti-BDS legislation in Kansas, which has now been made into law.
---
|
---
He has continued to demonstrate his active support for Israel as Kansas State Treasurer, participating in Pro-Israel rallies and introducing a bill in last year's legislative session to allow the State of Kansas to invest in Israel bonds, an important step in not only diversifying our State’s portfolio but also giving Kansas an opportunity to strengthen its relationship with Israel.
---
| **Join with Jake and the Trump Administration in supporting a Pro-Israel agenda. It is the right thing to do!** [**Donate today to ensure we have a solid, trusted Republican working for us in Washington in 2020.**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d686dc8491&e=1050d051da)
Yours in the Fight,
Team LaTurner
---
| [SHOW YOUR SUPPORT TODAY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c1129802b0&e=1050d051da "SHOW YOUR SUPPORT TODAY")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b2/3eb3e2fc/6979655c/744ee36e/189547201/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191213_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191213_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8b2/3eb3e2fc/6979655c/744ee36d/189547201/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191213_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191213_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Renee=20Unterman?=
subject: Campaign Newsletter, 12/13/19
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Greetings from the campaign trail!

I hope you are enjoying this holiday season - I know I am! This past Saturday we participated in the Buford Holiday and Cumming Christmas parades, and I attended the Gwinnett GOP Christmas Brunch and Forsyth GOP Christmas party. I loved getting to see so many friendly faces!
---
|
---
---
| Next, it was great to join the City of Sugar Hill's Youth Council to discuss the important issues coming up in the 2020 legislative session. It's an honor to work with these bright city ambassadors throughout the year and I look forward to having them page at the Capitol during session!
---
|
---
| This morning, I spoke at a forum hosted by the Georgia AARP on the benefits of telemedicine. I was humbled to receive the Capitol Caregiver Award in recognition of my work to improve healthcare in our state! In Congress, I will continue these efforts to provide better and more affordable coverage to the people of Forsyth and Gwinnett Counties.
---
|
---
| Our grassroots campaign relies on the support of Georgians like YOU, and I cannot do this without your help.** I am asking my top supporters to please do the following:**
1. **Donate** [online](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=afa6a72437&e=c1dbff800f) – any amount helps!
2. **Like** our [Facebook](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=9b59e317ba&e=c1dbff800f) page, and follow me on [Twitter](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=d0333c9d98&e=c1dbff800f) and [Instagram](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=afc840a062&e=c1dbff800f).
3. **Share** campaign social media posts online with your friends and family.
4. **[Visit](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=da6a173a89&e=c1dbff800f) **my website and [volunteer](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=994dc140ae&e=c1dbff800f) to make phone calls, canvass your neighborhood, host a meet & greet, or join me for an upcoming event!

---
| Thank you so much for your support in this journey.

Until next week!

-Renee
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=288452ade3&e=c1dbff800f)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=65b53631c7&e=c1dbff800f)
---

---

Unterman for CongressPO Box 508Buford, GA 30515-0508

Today is the perfect moment to make your first donation to this campaign. Here's why:

Our movement is up against a big test this month: the next FEC fundraising deadline on December 31.

Our fundraising performance this quarter will impact the investments we can make before the Iowa Caucuses and early voting contests. And it will also be on our public FEC report for the world to see if our campaign has gained momentum in the past three months.

[**You've been an important part of this team, and today we're asking you to take the next step: Will you chip in for the first time today to help reach this critical mid-month goal?**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM56F_MMG_GOL_C_20191213_V1S2_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM56F_MMG_GOL_C_20191213_V1S2_P_T2)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
We're in real danger of falling behind, and we only have a few weeks to change that before we close the books on this fundraising quarter.
I'll be blunt, team:

We're behind where we need to be right now when it comes to closing the fundraising gap.

Cory Gardner already had a big head start in the money race--and in the last few months, outside groups and a whole bunch of Mitch McConnell's powerful D.C. friends have been pouring money into Colorado to help him hold on to this Senate seat.

We're in real danger of falling behind, and we only have a few weeks to change that before we close the books on this fundraising quarter.

**I need to ask directly:** [**_Can you chip in today to help close the gap?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191213_JH_20191213-fr-JH-shortbump-nop_nop_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you so much. I am endlessly grateful for your support.

-- John
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_fr_20191213_JH_20191213-fr-JH-shortbump-nop_nop_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

\-------------------------
Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771409/691c9bd/6fa7636c/11a7c30e/1104809167/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771409/691c9bd/6fa7636c/11a7c30f/1104809167/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771409/691c9bd/6fa7636c/11a7c30c/1104809167/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771409/691c9bd/6fa7636c/11a7c30d/1104809167/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [**_here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771409/691c9bd/6fa7636c/11a7c30a/1104809167/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Team Collins
subject: Sara Gideon is putting campaigning before governing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Sara Gideon has made it clear that she cares far more about campaigning for her next job than she does about governing. She actually said this:
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDEzMzI0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3MDU0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDEzMzI0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3MDU0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Peter,

Sara Gideon has made it clear that she cares far more about campaigning for her next job than she does about governing. She actually said this:
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDEzMzI0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3MDU0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Sara Gideon, the Speaker of the Maine House of Representatives, collects a salary paid by Maine taxpayers. But **she believes it is more important to campaign against Susan Collins than to do her job.**

Peter, Susan's number one priority is governing. She will never let campaigning get in the way of her work for the people of Maine and America.

That is why Susan has **NEVER** missed a vote in the Senate. Not one. Ever since Susan first became Senator in 1997, her focus has always been on fighting for Mainers and Americans. To this day, she has not changed that philosophy one bit.
[**Chip in to ensure strong leadership, not partisan politics!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEzMzI0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3MDU0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Sara would fit in perfectly with the partisan far Left elites in Washington. She has shown that she cares far more about advancing her political career, than she does about doing the job Mainers pay her to do.

We must ensure the people of Maine continue to have strong leadership. We must win this fight!
_****_
[DONATE!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDEzMzI0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3MDU0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
-Team Collins

name: MJ Hegar
subject: the mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I complete my missions.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906f1/7f51f7bc/4a57bfc7/4ef0e8f5/3623808213/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I can't believe how quickly the time is flying by. It seems like just weeks ago we were launching this campaign from scratch -- but we've already driven more than 10,000 miles, met over 10,000 Texans, and gained the support of more than 24,000 donors. And Peter, that's all _without_ corporate PACs propping us up. [**Can you pitch in to help us keep it up?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906f1/7f51f7bc/4a57bfc7/4ef0e8f4/3623808213/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191213.2nd__624__&amount=10&recurring=true")

We're not stopping anytime soon because **I complete my missions** , and this one is no exception. I'm ready to take the fight to Sen. Mike was in the intelligence hearings and witnessed all this firsthand. [_**He stood up for his constituents**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDEzMzM1OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3NjQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
What do you say, Peter? Has impeachment gone too far?
Mike Turner agrees. Congress needs to stop the impeachment nonsense and get back to work!
But Mike and his colleagues need your help. [_**Can you join with Mike to hold Adam Schiff and Jerry Nadler accountable for this partisan impeachment process?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDEzMzM1OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3NjQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

There are real problems facing Congress but Schiff and Nadler have made sure that nothing has gotten done but impeachment for over the past two months. Join Mike and tell Pelosi and her band of impeachment supporting politicians that enough is enough.
It's time to get Congress back to work.
[_**Sign on to help end impeachment today! >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEzMzM1OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTI3NjQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Team Turner

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Hiding in the bathtub
body:
We are failing our children by letting them live with such deep-seated fear.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361abc/704929dc/167c86fe/3993ef63/690438704/VEsH/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.wendydavisforcongress.com/")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361abc/704929dc/167c86fe/3993ef63/690438704/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.wendydavisforcongress.com/")
Friend,
Most anyone who's lived in Texas knows about dealing with tornadoes. Back in October, a really bad one ripped through Dallas. I spoke with a couple who lived through it - parents to a 7-year-old girl and a 5-year-old boy. They told me that as they were taking shelter, huddling in their bathtub to keep safe from the tornado, their daughter began chattering nervously because she was scared.
**Her brother pleaded with her to stay quiet, telling her, "If he hears us, he'll shoot us."** You see, that little boy had just learned in school how to hide from an active shooter. And he thought he and his family were hiding from a man with a gun.
Does that make you angry? Sad? As a grandmother, I felt both. I was furious that we are now having to teach our children to be afraid of something they should never have to think about. And that's because Republican leaders are failing our children, leaving them to live with the trauma of such deep-seated fear. And what do Republican members of Congress do when confronted with this failure? With shooting after shooting after shooting? What do they do?
Nothing. In their cravenness, friend, people like my opponent, Chip Roy, do nothing - putting their NRA scorecard ahead of the safety of their own communities and the sanctity of our children.
**No more. We must force action, and I 'm hoping for your support today.** **[Will you sign my petition to demand Mitch McConnell and the Senate vote on gun safety legislation? Add your name and help us get to 10,000 signatures before midnight.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-gun_safety?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk18-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-gun_safety%3Fcode%3Djtk18-su-nd")**
This blatant disregard for human life cannot continue, especially with commonsense solutions to gun violence right in front of us. Solutions like the Violence Against Women Act, which would prevent those with a domestic abuse record from owning a firearm. Solutions like the bipartisan bill to expand background checks.
Chip Roy voted against both of those measures. Like his former boss Ted Cruz, he refuses to stand up against the gun lobby - from which he's accepted thousands of dollars in donations.
My grandbabies inspire me to run for Congress. I'm determined to enable them to live without fear of gun violence - in a country free from mass shootings and free from active shooter drills like that little boy in Dallas and hundreds of thousands of school kids across this country have had to experience.
**[If you agree- if that's the kind of country you demand as well - then add your name to my petition right now to demand Mitch McConnell and the Senate vote on gun safety legislation.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-gun_safety?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk18-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-gun_safety%3Fcode%3Djtk18-su-nd")**
Thank you for making your voice heard.
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361abc/704929dc/167c86fe/3993ef65/690438704/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361abc/704929dc/167c86fe/3993ef64/690438704/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361abc/704929dc/167c86fe/3993ef67/690438704/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump approval continues falling among independents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, MSNBC recently reported polling data from across the country showing Trump's job approval rating rapidly sinking in Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Michigan \-- key swing states in 2020. In all three states, his net approval is down by at least 17 points! Now, a new poll shows a 5 point drop approval among independent voters, key swing voters who could turn the tide in the 2020 election. He even saw a 3 point drop among Republican voters in the last month alone! This could be a game-changing moment for Democrats as we get ready for primaries season and selecting a nominee to defeat Trump. In order to drive this momentum into victory in 2020, we need to update our data on where voters stand: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4a/6e9863e8/17341255/1db0b7cc/242767160/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/s6x6Rxhw") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4a/6e9863e8/17341255/1db0b7cc/242767160/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/s6x6Rxhw") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf4a/6e9863e8/17341255/1db0b7d2/242767160/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191213c.ND&refcode2=t5tU4zPPpNOQJA40JDmU")

body:
| | |
---
| | **The New York Times: Climate Change Is Accelerating, Bringing World 'Dangerously Close' to Irreversible Change**
---
**TELL US NOW: Do you think climate change is a serious threat?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY3MTYwMzQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDkyNzEwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY3MTYwMzQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDkyNzEwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
There's no time to waste, Team: The effects of climate change are destroying our planet, costing the economy billions and hurting our children's and grandchildren's futures.
Despite the clear warning signs, like raging wildfires, rising sea levels and record heat waves, Donald Trump continues to ignore the climate catastrophe - and is actively making it worse.
The Trump administration has rolled back Obama-era emissions standards, withdrawn the United States from the Paris climate agreement and will seemingly agree to anything the fossil fuel lobby demands.
**If we 're going to take action to stop climate catastrophe and the disastrous Trump administration, we need to hear from grassroots Democrats like you. We're still 64 responses short of what we need before midnight. ****Tell us now:**
| | **Do you think climate change is a serious threat?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3MTYwMzQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDkyNzEwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3MTYwMzQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDkyNzEwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16716034&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MDkyNzEwMAS2&spReportId=MTc4MDkyNzEwMAS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
